origin.description: The city, port, warehouse, or pickup location where the shipment starts.

destination.description: The destination city, country, warehouse, port, or delivery address.

cargo_type.description: The type of goods being shipped.

weight.description: The gross weight of the shipment.

volume.description: The cargo volume, usually measured in CBM.

package_details.description: The number of cartons, pallets, dimensions, or packaging method.

delivery_requirement.description: The customer's preferred delivery time or urgency.

trade_term.description: Trade term or service type required by the customer.

cargo_value.description: The declared value of the cargo, useful for insurance and customs clearance.

pickup_address.description: The detailed pickup address or warehouse location.

delivery_address_type.description: Whether the destination is a residential address, commercial address, Amazon warehouse, Wayfair warehouse, port, or another type.

insurance_requirement.description: Whether the customer needs cargo insurance.

customs_clearance_requirement.description: Whether customs clearance support is required.

special_cargo_risk.description: Potential risks such as battery, liquid, fragile goods, oversized cargo, or dangerous goods.
